headline: VICI Properties (VICI) Price Target Cut to $34 at Baird Following Earnings Update
summary: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) is included among the 15 Best Stocks to Buy Now for Passive Income. On March 2, Baird lowered its price recommendation on VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) to $34 from $36. It kept an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm said it updated its model following the company’s fourth-quarter results, including […]

headline: Seven REIT stocks pass a strict financial screen, with dividends as high as 6.27%
summary: Bally’s Casino in Blackhawk, Colo., is among the facilities owned by Gaming Leisure Properties, which passed a financial screen of real-estate investment trusts.
